Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Dispatched From Delivery table using delivery_dispatch_date Since an order can have multiple deliveries each dispatch should be a separate event

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order Arrived From Delivery table using delivery_arrival_date Similarly for each delivery an arrival event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
